statement.markdown: Given a sorted array, implement an insertion sort algorithm that can correctly sort an array in ascending order. The provided code has a subtle bug that may result in incorrect sorting of the array, even if it starts as a sorted array. Your task is to identify and fix this bug.
statement.inputFormat: Input is an array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: Output is the sorted array in ascending order.

hints.text: Review the insertion sort algorithm and compare it with the provided code.

editorial.title: Insertion Sort Bug Fix
editorial.intuition: Insertion sort is a simple sorting algorithm that uses the comparison of adjacent elements to determine their correct order.
editorial.bruteForce: The provided code uses a brute-force approach to insertion sort, but it has a subtle bug that may cause incorrect sorting of the array.
editorial.optimalSolution: Fix the bug in the provided code to correctly sort the array in ascending order.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: To prove correctness, consider each case of the insertion sort algorithm and compare it with the provided code.
editorial.dryRun: Consider the case where the input array is already sorted in ascending order.
